prompt: What did you endure today that made you stronger?
Think lightly of yourself and deeply of the world. What weighs on you?
The boulder rolled back today. Did you push again?
Do not regret what you have done. What would you do differently?
The impediment to action advances action. What stands in your way?
There is nothing outside of yourself that can ever enable you to get better. What are you avoiding?
We suffer more in imagination than in reality. What fear are you carrying?
A man is great not because he hasn't failed, but because failure hasn't stopped him. When did you last fail forward?
The path is not meant to be easy. It is meant to be walked. Where are you on the path?
Accept the things to which fate binds you. What can you not change?
In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity. What opportunity did today reveal?
Today is victory over yourself of yesterday. How are you better than yesterday?
No man is free who is not master of himself. What controls you?
The market bled today. Did your conviction hold?
Difficulties strengthen the mind as labor does the body. What is training you right now?
All truly strong people are kind. Who did you lift up today?
He who fears death will never do anything worthy of a living man. What are you afraid to try?
Perceive that which cannot be seen with the eye. What truth are you ignoring?
You have power over your mind, not outside events. What can you control right now?
The only way to deal with an unfree world is to become so absolutely free that your very existence is an act of rebellion. How are you free?
Diamond hands are forged in fire. What fire are you sitting in?
Do nothing which is of no use. What should you stop doing?
It is not that we have a short time to live, but that we waste a great deal of it. How did you spend today?
Step by step. One punch at a time. One round at a time. What is your next step?
The wound is the place where the Light enters you. What wound is teaching you?
Waste no more time arguing about what a good man should be. Be one. What action can you take right now?
Know your enemy, know yourself, and you shall not fear a hundred battles. Who is your real enemy?
No one walks this path alone. Who walks with you?
The gem cannot be polished without friction. What is polishing you?
Respect Buddha and the gods without counting on their help. What are you relying on that you shouldn't be?
Man is condemned to be free. What will you do with your freedom today?
The best revenge is not to be like your enemy. What grudge should you release?
Become acquainted with every art. What skill are you neglecting?
He who has a why to live can bear almost any how. What is your why?
The market rewards those who wait. What are you waiting for?
It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop. What are you tempted to quit?
The unexamined life is not worth living. What did you learn about yourself today?
Under the sword lifted high, there is hell making you tremble. But go ahead, and you have the land of bliss. What sword hangs over you?
Red candles or green candles, the samurai holds his blade. What are you holding through?
First say to yourself what you would be, then do what you have to do. Who do you want to become?
One must still have chaos in oneself to give birth to a dancing star. What chaos are you holding?
Suffering is a gift. In it is hidden mercy. What mercy did today's pain reveal?
Do not seek to follow in the footsteps of the wise. Seek what they sought. What are you truly seeking?
The comfort zone is a beautiful place, but nothing ever grows there. When did you last leave it?
Fix your eyes on perfection and you make almost everything speed toward it. What standard do you refuse to lower?
Show up every day. Especially when it's hard. Did you show up today?
If you can fill the unforgiving minute with sixty seconds' worth of distance run. How did you fill this minute?
A warrior is worthless unless he rises above others and stands strong in the midst of a storm. What storm are you in?
Through suffering, strength. What strength did today's suffering build?
The soul becomes dyed with the color of its thoughts. What are you thinking about most?
